systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining Accolade II femoral and Trident II acetabular families.

trays.tray_notes: Stryker platform materials reference dedicated femoral and acetabular instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Core Trident II shell family referenced on the product page.
Core Trident II liner family referenced on the product page.
Core Accolade II stem family referenced within the platform.
Femoral head family used with the Accolade II / Trident II platform.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Platform includes multiple shell, liner and stem configurations.
unresolved_items.reason: Needs deeper technique or catalogue review before detailed family expansion.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction keeps the combined platform-level implant families only.
